items.caption:
ad this is the most difficult free clean I’ve ever done because all of the drains are blocked!! I used the @hg.uk Duo Unblocker and the HG Drain and plug Unblocker to give this bathroom the ultimate makeover #blockeddrains #plumbing 
#Bathroommakeover #cleantok #hgdoeswhatitpromises
items.transcript: This free clean is the most difficult I've ever taken on. The young woman living here has sadly been struggling with her mental health, and for the last year, she's been living without some of the basic things that most of us take for granted. Her toilet won't flush, her shower constantly overflows, the bathroom sink is blocked, and the entire kitchen has no running water. So, for the last year, she hasn't been able to shower, wash her clothes, cook, or even use the toilet in a typical way. So today, we're cleaning her home for free. And because I know this is a big job, I've called in some help from my friends at HG. Now, if you watched my previous video, you'll already know that because the toilet had stopped working, the resident had sadly turned to using her kitchen sink instead. As a result of this, the kitchen drain was badly blocked. So I used what I always use when I'm cleaning these types of situations, and that's the HG Duo Drain Unblocker. I just followed the instructions on the back and started by pouring part A and then part B down the drain. Because it's HG's most powerful drain unblocker, I'm using it in the shower too. Cause it needs it. Whilst that bubbles away in the background, we're gonna continue with the clean. Cause we've got a lot of caca on the floor to get rid of, and the rest of the bathroom still needs a lot of work. Also, you know I said the bathroom sink was blocked? I presumed it was blocked with soap scum and hair. So I used the HG Drain and Plug Unblocker, and no surprises here, it worked immediately. Although it might not look like it yet, we're actually really close to being done. But the more I cleaned, the more damage I found in this bathroom. Due to the shower and the toilet constantly over flooding, the bathroom did have significant water damage and mould. Now I can deal with the mould. But the resident's landlord will need to investigate why they were previously overfilling themselves with wastewater. But enough of that for now, it's finally time for the before and afters. And because HG sponsored this video, we were able to go the extra mile. We didn't just clean this entire property, we also refurnished everything too. And now the resident has everything she needs to get back on her feet and have the fresh start that she deserves. Big thanks to HG for making this possible.
